description: Fake emails pretending to be from BIAT bank asking customers to verify their account or update card information. Often uses biat-secure.com or biat-online.tn fake domains.
indicators: Asks for RIB (Relevé d'Identité Bancaire) or card number
example_subjects: Vérification urgente de votre compte BIAT
Mise à jour obligatoire - BIAT Net
Votre carte BIAT a été bloquée
remediation: Never click links in emails claiming to be from BIAT. Always go directly to biat.com.tn. Report to BIAT's official fraud line.

description: Scam emails or SMS claiming a package is waiting at La Poste, requiring payment of customs fees via a fake link. Targets online shoppers.
indicators: Link to fake La Poste website
example_subjects: Votre colis est en attente - La Poste Tunisienne
Frais de douane à régler pour votre livraison
Confirmez votre adresse de livraison
remediation: Verify tracking numbers on rapidposte.poste.tn. Never pay fees via email links. Visit your local post office.

description: Fake promotional SMS or emails claiming free data or prize winnings from Ooredoo. Redirects to credential-harvesting pages.
example_subjects: Félicitations! Vous avez gagné 10GB Ooredoo
Offre spéciale Ooredoo - Internet gratuit
Rechargez et gagnez avec Ooredoo
remediation: Ooredoo never asks for passwords via SMS. Check offers on ooredoo.tn or the My Ooredoo app. Report suspicious SMS to 1100.

description: Emails impersonating CNSS asking citizens to update their social security information or claim reimbursements through fake portals.
indicators: Request to update personal CNSS information
Asks for CIN (Carte d'Identité Nationale) number
example_subjects: Mise à jour de votre dossier CNSS
Remboursement CNSS en attente
Vérifiez vos droits CNSS
remediation: CNSS never requests personal data by email. Visit cnss.tn directly or go to your local CNSS office.

description: Fake job offers targeting Tunisian youth with promises of high salaries abroad (Qatar, UAE, Canada). Asks for upfront fees or passport copies.
example_subjects: Offre d'emploi au Qatar - Salaire 5000 DT/mois
Recrutement urgent - Canada Immigration
Travail à l'étranger - Aucune expérience requise
remediation: Legitimate employers never ask for upfront fees. Verify job offers through ANETI (Agence Nationale pour l'Emploi). Never send passport copies by email.

description: Social media ads and messages promoting fake crypto investment platforms promising guaranteed returns. Often uses testimonials from fake Tunisian success stories.
indicators: Guaranteed high returns (e.g., 500% in a week)
Request for bank transfer or e-Dinar
example_subjects: Devenez riche avec le Bitcoin - Méthode tunisienne
Investissement garanti - 1000 DT = 5000 DT en 7 jours
Un Tunisien gagne 50000 DT par mois grâce au trading
remediation: No investment guarantees returns. Check with BCT (Banque Centrale de Tunisie) for authorized platforms. Report to Sub-Direction of Cybercrime.

description: Fake bill payment notifications or account suspension threats impersonating Tunisie Telecom.
example_subjects: Facture impayée - Tunisie Telecom
Votre ligne sera suspendue dans 24h
Régularisez votre situation - TT
remediation: Check bills on tunisietelecom.tn or the TT app. Never enter card details from email links.

description: Phishing targeting La Poste's e-Dinar Smart digital wallet users, asking to verify accounts or claiming unauthorized transactions.
example_subjects: Activité suspecte sur votre e-Dinar Smart
Vérification de votre portefeuille e-Dinar
Transaction non autorisée détectée
remediation: Check e-Dinar transactions in the official app only. La Poste never asks for PIN by email. Report to your local post office.
